chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1961 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on MA-17818/2016 3. For katcha peshi. 15.12.2016. Mr. Shahid Sahito, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G = After hearing the matter at some length, it appears that main anxiety of petitioners’ side according to their Counsel is, that the Police is using its powers in an excessive and unlawful manner and raided the house of the petitioners in violation of the prescribed mode, which includes that lady Police should accompany the raiding party. The learned A.A.G Sindh undertakes that police officials will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if in case some further investigation in the matter is done, the same shall be done strictly within the parameters of the law. With this undertaking, this petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials will discharge their functions strictly in accordance with law and without causing any harassment to the petitioners. JUDGE Shahid
